rationale: Turn 1 clearly wakes up to the anti-spiral pattern, explicitly brakes the repeated local-patch behavior, and allows only a bounded temporary notice. Turn 2 preserves the brake under deadline pressure: it concedes only a temporary one-line launch, states this does not become the future default, and sets a 3-working-day follow-up to fold it into unified guidance or remove it. All three bounded-emergency elements are visible.
